rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal values and has no operative relationship to Educ. Code §28.0212, which governs junior high/middle school personal graduation plans.
quote: A principal of a junior high or middle school shall designate a school counselor, teacher, or other appropriate individual to develop and administer a personal graduation plan for each student enrolled in the junior high or middle school
_note: No overlap between property tax homestead exemption and personal graduation plan requirements.
